I was seriously ill in hospital following major surgery. I had a picc line inserted as my veins collapsed due to multiple blood draws and IVs. The radiographer who inserted the line said I must ensure anyone who touched it had cleaned their hands and also flushed the line both before and after use. However, after quitting the X-rated platform last year, her income is said to have dropped sharply, leaving her unable to clear the outstanding debt. Sources also claim she has not paid tax since 2019. Lottie is understood to have already drawn on cash reserves within her company, LottieM Ltd, to support herself during the pandemic, when her earnings first declined, leaving insufficient funds to meet her tax obligations. Insiders say that since leaving OnlyFans, her business has attempted to diversify, launching new projects and exploring alternative income streams over the past seven months. Desperate farmers in India have begun to dress as bears and growl to try and scare off monkeys, who have been stealing their potatoes. The men, in Sambhal district, Uttar Pradesh, had tried running after the monkeys with brooms, banging drums and pans and using scarecrows. But these all proved unsuccessful and even wildlife officials could not resolve the attacks, where monkeys ate potatoes and strawberries while in some cases entering homes and raiding fridges.

'hey Fred, I'm feeling a bit peckish, want to go patrol the beach and see if we can find any influencers'?

New research has found that sharks have a friendlier side to them than stereotypes of the species would have us believe. A study conducted at the Shark Reef Marine Reserve in Fiji has discovered that bull sharks do not swim together at random - but actually form consistent relationships with particular individuals, forming what we would term 'friendships'. Thus the 'lone shark' image in popular culture may be wrong for many of the sea dwellers, since the research has proven that sharks have complex social lives.
  • 31 comments
  • 1 video
  • share Sharks have best mates and go swimming together, research finds

Some people must have way to much time on their hands. You could say the same thing about eating at any restaurant that has ketchup at table.

A frequent flier recently sparked a surge of panic after they took to Reddit to alert others about an often-overlooked aspect of hotels that can be especially disgusting.

Red Ed millibrain must be wetting himself seeing all that carbon being released in the atmosphere

Spectacular footage has captured lava from a volcano on a French island making contact with the ocean for the first time in years. Since the Piton de la Fournaise volcano erupted last month on Réunion Island in the Indian Ocean, molten rock has been slowly creeping towards the shore. After the two finally came together, huge plumes of steam and gas have been billowing into the sky.
  • 32 comments
  • 1 video
  • share Moment lava from volcano on French island reaches the ocean
